summary: Reputation Scoring System testing complete. All 13 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend components verified via code review - all required data-testid attributes present. POI markers not rendering on map due to pre-existing timing issue (POIs fetched but not re-rendered), preventing live UI testing of POI popup reputation section.

integration_issues.issue: POIs are fetched (99 saved to cache) but not rendering on map. Console shows 'POIs filtered: 0 out of 0 total' even after POIs are saved. This is a pre-existing timing/state issue, not related to reputation scoring feature.

VERIFIED: calcFacilityReputationScore returns 0 when total_reports=0 or no speed/parking data, and >0 when there are valid reports
VERIFIED: data-testid='facility-reputation-section' present in FacilityPanel.tsx line 283

context_for_next_testing_agent: App at http://localhost:8001. Vite+Express single-stack. Reputation scoring feature fully implemented in backend and frontend code. Backend APIs verified working: GET /api/facilities returns majority.reputation_score, POST /api/facilities/report updates reputation_score, GET /api/poi/parking-status returns reputation_score. Frontend components have all required data-testid attributes. PRE-EXISTING ISSUE: POI markers not rendering on map (POIs fetched but state not triggering re-render). To test POI popup reputation section, need to fix POI rendering issue first. Facility markers should appear when showFacilities=true and userLocation is valid near Michigan area (lat=42, lon=-83).
